title: Semester-End Examination Process in Algorithmic Game Theory
description: A flowchart illustrating the strategic decision-making process and outcomes for a student preparing for the Algorithmic Game Theory final exam.
elements: Examination Content (Nash Equilibrium, Mechanism Design, Auctions)
relationships: Student chooses study strategy based on predicted exam content -> Student's performance is a function of preparation and exam difficulty -> Performance leads to a grading outcome -> Outcome results in a payoff of a grade and utility
